description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and a mix of white and light wood exterior finishes. The structure features multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that open onto private patios and green lawn areas. The front includes a driveway with two parked cars, a covered carport, and a small landscaped garden. The rear of the house showcases an outdoor dining area, a sunken lounge, and a partially enclosed patio with a hot tub or pool. The house is surrounded by low boundary walls, providing privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, white and wood finishes, and multiple patios and green spaces. The design features clean lines, open living areas, and a private driveway with a carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, main entrance, and a small garden area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rear patio, outdoor seating, and a partially enclosed hot tub or pool area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the outdoor dining area, sunken lounge, and extensive glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible large windows, secondary entrance, and a landscaped side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, small steps, and a covered carport with clean lines and no decorative columns.
